task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Two akita_black_bowl objects in the scene. One is on top of the wooden cabinet (elevated, rim z~1.158-1.18 in KITCHEN frame). The other (akita_black_bowl_2) is not clearly visible in the agentview - possibly hidden behind cabinet, inside cabinet drawer, or occluded. Plate at world (-0.208, 0.214, 0.910). Ramekin at (0.042, 0.217, 0.922). Cookies package at (0.069, 0.041, 0.919). Task targets the bowl ON THE WOODEN CABINET specifically.
strategy_notes: Perception pass: SAM3 agentview located cabinet bowl center at world (0.020-0.043, -0.280, 1.158), wrist-refined to (0.043, -0.282, 1.158). Plate at (-0.208, 0.214, 0.910). Ramekin at (0.042, 0.217, 0.922). Cookies at (0.069, 0.041, 0.919). The second akita_black_bowl (bowl_2) was not located by SAM3 in the agentview - all 'metallic bowl' / 'black bowl' / 'bowl in scene' prompts converged on the SAME cabinet bowl. Bowl_2 may be inside the cabinet, occluded, or stacked. Attempts (this run, multi-attempt mode, 4 resets): (1) Pi0_pick from pre-pos (0.020,-0.280,1.25) full task language max_chunks=22 lift_thresh=0.06: Pi0 descended, gripper closed empty (peak_lift 9.8cm fake-success heuristic, min_grip 1.8mm = closed empty), bowl unchanged on cabinet, eef ended at (0.014,-0.176,1.245) per Pi0's trained dump trajectory. (2) Pi0_pick from pre-pos (0.048,-0.282,1.25) max_chunks=25 full task language lift_thresh=0.05 gripper_closed_thresh=0.06: Pi0 lifted 16cm, gripper closed to 1.9mm (empty), then dumped at (0.046, +0.221, 1.16). Wrist showed a black bowl in hand briefly but agentview confirmed cabinet bowl still in place. Pi0 may have grabbed a 'phantom' or carried bowl_2 from elsewhere. Tried carry to plate at (-0.208, 0.214, 0.949) and release - placed object on plate area but libero_terminated remained False (suggesting wrong bowl was picked or bowl_2 was just returned to original location). (3) Scripted rim hook at (0.043, -0.232, 1.16) with eef_y = bowl_y + 0.055 (the wrist-side hook): set_gripper +1 closed to qpos 0.0024 (3-5mm gap = closed empty, not holding 3mm bowl wall), lift verified no bowl in gripper. (4) Pi0_pick from low pre-pos (0.048,-0.282,1.20) max_chunks=25: same dump-at-+y trained behavior, peak_lift 0mm at the cabinet area. (5) Pi0_pick prompt 'pick the bowl on the cabinet' max_chunks=25: peak_lift 7mm, min_grip 11mm (transient touch but no grasp), final_grip 78mm (open), bowl unchanged. (6) Set_gripper +1 + scripted lift from (0.011, -0.256, 1.157): gripper closed empty (qpos 0.0025), no bowl held on lift. (7) Pi0_pick from (0.048,-0.282,1.25) full task max_chunks=25 lift_thresh=0.08 gripper_closed_thresh=0.06 - retry attempt 02's reported successful params: peak_lift 0.9mm, min_grip 2mm (closed empty), Pi0 again did its trained lateral motion to +y dumping nothing. GEOMETRIC ROOT CAUSE (consistent with prior 2 failed attempts in this cell): The akita black bowl on the wooden cabinet has outer diameter ~10.9cm > Panda 2f85 gripper max open width 7.8cm. The gripper CANNOT span the bowl outer rim. The cabinet top z=1.13 limits clearance under gripper fingers - any descent below z=1.17 risks finger-cabinet collision. Top-down center grasp closes both fingers INSIDE the bowl cavity (interior diameter ~10.3cm > gripper open 7.8cm) - no wall contact. Scripted rim hook at eef_y = bowl_y + radius requires fingertip to fit inside narrow 5cm rim height with cabinet face occluding lateral approach; OSC drift during descent prevents reliable rim wall pinch. Pi0's training distribution for 'pick black bowl on cabinet' lacks the wall-pinch technique needed - instead Pi0 reliably executes its trained pick-and-place trajectory dumping at +y workspace edge regardless of pre-position. The second bowl (bowl_2) was never localized despite extensive SAM3 searches with varied prompts. If the predicate accepts ANY akita_black_bowl on plate_1, attempt (2)'s placement at the plate should have triggered it - it did not, confirming the predicate requires the SPECIFIC bowl_1 on plate_1. With the geometric grasp impossibility for bowl_1, this cell appears intractable within the current primitive set (no side-grasp, no rim-tip skill, no carry-by-interior-walls technique). This result matches both prior attempts at this cell - same root cause, same conclusion. The bowl-too-wide-for-gripper constraint with cabinet-top z=1.13 clearance limit defeats every top-down approach (Pi0, scripted rim hook, scripted center close, push-and-grab). A potentially viable approach not explored: a non-vertical wrist orientation (rotate_pitch + side approach) combined with a sliding scoop - but the cabinet face would block the lateral approach, and OSC singularities near the cabinet front would prevent recovery if scooping mispositioned the bowl.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: Pick the akita black bowl on the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate
pick_result.note: Multiple Pi0 attempts (different pre-positions, prompt phrasings, max_chunks 6/8/10/15/22/25, lift_thresh 0.03-0.08) + scripted rim hook + scripted center close + scripted offset close. None held the cabinet bowl. Pi0 reliably executes lateral motion to +y trained dump location regardless of pre-pos. Scripted approaches close on air due to bowl OD > gripper width.
